For grown-ups: start on Whisper. When that feels easy, let Badr turn it up to Normal, then Loud — at his own pace. He's the boss of the volume.

🥤🥤

Drive the vacuum and gobble up the mess! 🍪

All clean! 🧼

⭐ 0
Slide Daddy and Badr under the big bucket! 💧

How brave are you today?

💦💦

Splash! 💦

You slid us right under it — we got soaked together! So brave, Badr!

⭐ 0
Chase Daddy and shout BOOOOOOOOOW to scare him! 👻

How big is your BOOOOOOOOOW?

AAH!
BOOOOOOOOOW!
🎉🎉

You got me!! 😆

Daddy was SO scared! You are the bravest, Badoory!
